calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Prove-Up Hearing Date And Default Court Judgment On Defendant Kahlil Tobias Ford
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant Kahlil Tobias Ford.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:39:04 a.m. and concluding at 10:53:57 a.m.(D505)

Kaipolani K. Young, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Community First Credit Union via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Kahlil Tobias Ford not appearing.
Witness Kathryn Clanfield sworn to testify for the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.
Witness Kelsey Minier sworn to testify for the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Counsel to provide a summary and offers proof as to the request for judgment to the court.
Counsel offers proof to each witness testimony.
Counsel examines witness.
The elements for a request for judgment is discussed.
Court examines witness. Witness confirms that declarations and statements made are true and correct.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

Damages $24,647.67
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $0
Attorney's Fees $2,600.00
Costs $608.00
Total Judgment $27,855.67

Proposed judgment as amended is signed and executed this day.
